story.title: Our Love Story
story.preview: From a shared coffee on a rainy afternoon to a lifetime.
fullStory: It all started at a small, sun-drenched cafe. What was meant to be a quick coffee turned into hours of conversation about our shared dreams, favorite books, and a mutual love for old garden pathways.
Over the years, those conversations grew into a lifetime of memories. From hiking through misty mountains to quiet evenings spent planning our future, every moment brought us closer together.
Now, as we stand on the threshold of our greatest adventure yet, we are so grateful to have you by our side to witness the beginning of our forever.
